violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walk in coolers have an accumulation of dust debris and mold on the walls and ceilings. Requires a more frequent cleaning with Bleach or quaternary Ammonium.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food * was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. - Hot holding table was not operational and unable to hold hot foods at +140*F while serving food.
